title: Field-Tech Lab 001: Endpoint Identity
description: Submission template for the existing Field-Tech Lab 001 endpoint identity lab.

required_evidence.label: Endpoint identity
required_evidence.description: Identify the endpoint, hostname, device/user context, and where the work was performed.

required_evidence.label: Access validation
required_evidence.description: Show that you accessed the correct system using the approved student or technician workflow.

required_evidence.label: System observations
required_evidence.description: Document what you observed about the endpoint identity, environment, or configuration.

required_evidence.label: Evidence collected
required_evidence.description: Provide command output, screenshots description, or written evidence. Do not include passwords, tokens, or private keys.

required_evidence.label: Professional summary
required_evidence.description: Write a short field-tech style completion summary explaining what was verified.

completion_signals: student identifies the endpoint or lab target
safety_rules: Do not submit passwords, API keys, SSH private keys, session cookies, or tokens.
Do not collect unrelated personal information.
Use approved commands and approved lab scope only.
Document what you observed before claiming completion.
